name: GOLFTEC Nashville West
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf instruction and club fitting center that utilizes advanced motion measurement technology and high-speed video analysis. Their lessons are built on personalized plans created by expert PGA-certified coaches who identify swing issues and guide improvement through a structured journey. The facilities focus on providing a controlled environment for learning and practice, with an emphasis on using technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors to deliver actionable feedback. While the specific Nashville West location page was not found, the brand's standard model offers both lessons and club fitting services, complemented by a pro shop for purchasing equipment at competitive prices.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven coaching using advanced motion analysis and launch monitor technology
Personalized game plans and improvement strategies tailored to individual goals
Expert PGA-certified coaches with a team-oriented approach to instruction
Club fitting services that provide, on average, 21 more yards off the tee
Access to high-tech training bays for structured practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available.
No information on alcohol service available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Website mentions launch monitors but does not specify a brand like Trackman or Foresight.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: While you can use your own clubs, GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and fitting services to help you find the perfect equipment for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information on a BYOB policy or in-house food and beverage service at GOLFTEC locations.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time frame for a full 18-hole simulator session, as lessons and practice sessions are structured by the coach.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and has been noted as kid-friendly, providing a structured environment for youth golfers to learn and improve.
